mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.document_id, c.chunk_index, d.file_name AS document_name, c.content, c.content_length, c.source_title, c.source_page, c.source_paragraph, c.metadata_json, c.vector_id, c.vector_status, c.vector_error_message, c.create_time FROM lwh_ai_document_chunk c INNER JOIN lwh_ai_document d ON d.id = c.document_id WHERE c.document_id = #{documentId} AND c.status = 1 AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY c.chunk_index ASC
SELECT vector_id FROM lwh_ai_document_chunk WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND vector_id IS NOT NULL AND vector_id != ''

SELECT c.id, c.document_id, c.chunk_index, d.file_name AS document_name, c.content, c.content_length, c.source_title, c.source_page, c.source_paragraph, c.metadata_json, c.vector_id, c.vector_status, c.vector_error_message, c.create_time FROM lwh_ai_document_chunk c INNER JOIN lwh_ai_document d ON d.id = c.document_id WHERE c.status = 1 AND d.status = 1 AND d.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND c.vector_id IN
#{vectorId}

SELECT c.id, c.document_id, c.chunk_index, d.file_name AS document_name, c.content, c.content_length, c.source_title, c.source_page, c.source_paragraph, c.metadata_json, c.vector_id, c.vector_status, c.vector_error_message, c.create_time FROM lwh_ai_document_chunk c INNER JOIN lwh_ai_document d ON d.id = c.document_id WHERE c.status = 1 AND d.status = 1 AND d.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND c.id IN
#{chunkId}

SELECT c.id AS chunk_id, c.document_id, d.category_id, c.chunk_index, d.title, d.file_name, c.content, c.source_title, d.source_type, c.vector_id, d.publish_status, d.status AS document_status, c.status AS chunk_status, d.update_time FROM lwh_ai_document_chunk c INNER JOIN lwh_ai_document d ON d.id = c.document_id WHERE c.document_id = #{documentId} AND c.status = 1 AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY c.chunk_index ASC

SELECT c.id AS chunk_id, c.document_id, d.category_id, c.chunk_index, d.title, d.file_name, c.content, c.source_title, d.source_type, c.vector_id, d.publish_status, d.status AS document_status, c.status AS chunk_status, d.update_time FROM lwh_ai_document_chunk c INNER JOIN lwh_ai_document d ON d.id = c.document_id WHERE c.status = 1 AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY c.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO lwh_ai_document_chunk (document_id, chunk_index, content, content_length, source_title, source_page, source_paragraph, metadata_json, vector_id, vector_status, vector_error_message, status) VALUES
(#{chunk.documentId}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.content}, #{chunk.contentLength}, #{chunk.sourceTitle}, #{chunk.sourcePage}, #{chunk.sourceParagraph}, #{chunk.metadataJson}, #{chunk.vectorId}, #{chunk.vectorStatus}, #{chunk.vectorErrorMessage}, #{chunk.status})
mapper.update: UPDATE lwh_ai_document_chunk SET vector_id = #{vectorId}, vector_status = 'SUCCESS', vector_error_message = NULL WHERE id = #{chunkId} AND status = 1

UPDATE lwh_ai_document_chunk SET status = #{status}, vector_id = CASE WHEN #{status} = 0 AND status != 0 THEN NULL ELSE vector_id END, chunk_index = CASE WHEN #{status} = 0 AND status != 0 THEN -id ELSE chunk_index END WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
